debug_info.goal:
case h
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
M : ℕ
hN : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f n x - F x| < ε / (b - a)
⊢ |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

failed_attempts: simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_sub_bound hab M (fun x => f n x - F x) (ε := ε) hε hN
simpa [RiemannSum, dist_eq] using RiemannSum_sub_lt_of_supnorm_lt hab M hN

have h := RiemannSum_diff_bound hab (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) hN
  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_sub_lt_of_unifBound hab M hN
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_sub_lt_of_forall_lt hab M hN

have hba : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hle : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      RiemannSum_sub_le_integral_supnorm hab (fun x => f n x - F x) (ε / (b - a)) hN M
  have hlt : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) < ε := by
    have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
      field_simp [hba.ne']
    simpa [this]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hlt
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_bound hab M hN

have hba : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hle : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M|
      ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [RiemannSum, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
      mul_comm, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hba)]
      using RiemannSum_sub_le_const hab (fun x => (f n x)) (fun x => F x) (ε / (b - a)) M hN
  have hlt : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) < ε := by
    have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
      field_simp [hba.ne']
    simpa [this]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hlt

simpa [RiemannSum, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, add_mul, sub_mul,
    mul_add, mul_sub, Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_add_distrib,
    abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by have : 0 < (b - a) := by linarith [hab]; exact this),
    div_eq_mul_inv] using
    (RiemannSum_sub_bound hab (f n) F M (ε := ε) hN)
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_lt_of_forall_lt hab M (f n) F (ε := ε) hε hN
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_sub_lt_of_unif (a := a) (b := b) (M := M) hab hN
simpa [RiemannSum_diff] using RiemannSum_diff_lt_of_unif hab M hN hε
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_bound hab M hN

simpa [RiemannSum, Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs] using
    RiemannSum_diff_lt_of_unifBound hab M hN

have hbapos : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hle : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      RiemannSum_diff_bound hab (fun x => f n x) F M (ε / (b - a)) hN
  have hlt : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) < ε := by
    have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
      field_simp [hbapos.ne']
    simpa [this] using hε
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hlt
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_lt_of_unifBound hab M hN
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_bound hab M (f n) F (ε / (b - a)) hN
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_lt_of_unif hab M hN

have hle :
      |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      RiemannSum_sub_le (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) hN
  have hpos : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
  have hmul : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
    field_simp [hpos.ne'] 
  have : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε := by
    have := lt_of_le_of_lt hle (by simpa [hmul] using lt_of_le_of_lt (le_rfl) (lt_of_lt_of_eq (mul_pos hpos (by
      have : 0 < ε / (b - a) := by
        exact div_pos hε hpos
      exact this)) rfl))
    simpa [hmul] using lt_of_le_of_lt hle (by
      have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) < ε + 0 := by
        simpa [hmul] using lt_add_of_pos_right ε (show 0 < (0:ℝ) from by simpa)
      simpa using lt_of_lt_of_eq this (by ring))
  exact this
simpa [RiemannSum] using RSabsdiff_lt_of_unif bound hab M hN

have hba : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hε' : 0 < ε / (b - a) := by
    have : 0 < (b - a) := hba
    exact div_pos hε this
  simpa [RiemannSum, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, abs_sub_comm] using
    RiemannSum_sub_lt_of_unif (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) hba hε' hN

have hpos : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hle : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      RiemannSum_sub_le_mul_sup (f n) F a b M (fun x => (hN x).le)
  have hlt : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) < ε := by
    have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
      field_simp [hpos.ne']
    simpa [this]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hlt

simpa [RiemannSum, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, sub_mul,
    mul_sub, Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_mul] using
    (RiemannSum_sub_lt_of_abs_sub_lt hab M hN)

have hM :
      |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| < (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_abs_lt_of_abs_lt hab M hN
  have hEq :
      RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M =
        RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M := by
    simp [RiemannSum, sub_eq_add_neg, Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, mul_add,
      mul_sub, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_mul, sub_mul]
  have hPos : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
  have hMul : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
    field_simp [hPos.ne']
  simpa [hEq, hMul] using hM

simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_sub_bound hab M (fun x => f n x - F x) (ε := ε) (by
    intro x
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hN x)

have h : |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| < ε := by
    simpa [RiemannSum_sub] using (RiemannSum_abs_le_of_abs_le_const hab M (ε / (b - a)) hN)
  simpa [RiemannSum_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h

have hab' : 0 < b - a := by linarith
  have hε' : 0 ≤ ε / (b - a) := by
    exact div_nonneg (le_of_lt hε) (le_of_lt hab')
  have hsum :
      |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M|
        ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [RiemannSum] using
      (RiemannSum_sub_le (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) hε' hN)
  have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
    field_simp [hab'.ne']
  have hle : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| ≤ ε := by
    simpa [this] using hsum
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hε

simpa [RiemannSum, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, mul_sub,
    sub_mul, sub_eq_add_neg, abs_neg, abs_sub_comm] using
    RiemannSum_diff_bound hab M (fun x => f n x) F (ε / (b - a)) hN (by bound)
simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_bound hab M (fun x => f n x) F (ε / (b - a)) hN hε

have hab' : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
  have hε' : 0 < ε / (b - a) := by
    exact div_pos hε hab'
  have hle : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M|
      ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using
      RiemannSum_sub_le (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) (fun x => (le_of_lt (hN x)))
  have hlt : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) < ε := by
    have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
      field_simp [hab'.ne']
    simpa [this]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hlt

have hbapos : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
  have hle :
      |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M|
        ≤ (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) := by
    simpa [RiemannSum] using RiemannSum_diff_le_sup (f n) F a b M (ε / (b - a)) hN
  have hlt : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) < ε := by
    have : (b - a) * (ε / (b - a)) = ε := by
      field_simp [hbapos.ne']
    simpa [this]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hlt

have hba : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
  have habs : |b - a| = b - a := abs_of_pos hba
  have h' : |RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M| < ε := by
    simpa [RiemannSum_sub] using
      (abs_RiemannSum_lt_of_abs_lt_const hab (fun x => f n x - F x) (ε / (b - a)) M
        (by intro x; simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hN x))
  have : RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M =
      RiemannSum (fun x => f n x - F x) a b M := by
    simpa [RiemannSum_sub]
  simpa [this] using h'
